headline: Apple Gears Up for Executive Shake-Up — Here's Who's in the Succession Spotlight
summary: Apple is preparing for a significant reshuffling of its top brass.

headline: Jack Dorsey Once Said People Unknowingly Work For Social Media, AI Companies For 'Free' And They 'Will Be Replaced' — Bitcoin Offers a Different Model
summary: Technology mogul Jack Dorsey has long championed decentralized technologies such as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), suggesting their application in areas like artificial intelligence and social media.

summary: As the EV credit has officially ended, here's a look at how major automakers reacted to the development following September 30 deadline.

summary: Apple's busy week: App Store revenue up 10%, ICE tracking apps removed, Vision Pro headset paused, and strong iPhone 17 sales driven by speed.

summary: Donald Trump's recent actions are driving major developments in federal employment, the EV market, nuclear energy, and rare earth investments.

headline: Uber, Lyft Drivers Gain Historic Right To Unionize In California As Newsom Signs Bill Impacting 800,000 Gig Workers
summary: California Governor Newsom signs bill granting Uber and Lyft drivers the legal right to unionize, marking a major victory for gig workers.

headline: Tesla Shareholders Oppose Elon Musk's $1 Trillion Pay Package Amid Governance Concerns, EV Tax Credit Expiration
summary: Tesla shareholders are pushing back against Musk's $1 trillion pay package, citing governance concerns, risks from expiring EV tax credits.

headline: From Sam Altman Standing With Pokemon Characters To McDonald's Mascot Fleeing: OpenAI Appears To Be Abandoning Its Sora Copyright Policy
summary: OpenAI CEO announces changes to Sora video-generation app in response to legal and public backlash. Users can now have more control.

headline: OpenAI Acquires AI Finance App Roi In CEO-Only Deal As Consumer Products Push Continues
summary: OpenAI acquires Roi, an AI-driven personal finance app, with only its CEO joining the company. This follows OpenAI's trend of acqui-hires.

headline: Former Cisco CEO John Chambers Warns AI Market Surge Mirrors Dot-Com Bubble, Predicts Faster Job Displacement, Market Volatility
summary: John Chambers warns that AI's rapid growth could disrupt jobs and companies, even as some tech leaders highlight its productivity benefits.

headline: OpenAI's Sam Altman Turns To Asia, Middle East For Funds Amid Multitrillion-Dollar Push To Build Next-Gen Data Centers
summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman launches campaign to secure chips, partners, and funding for company's trillion-dollar AI expansion.

headline: Jeff Bezos Predicts Gigawatt-Scale Orbital Data Centers In 10–20 Years, Compares AI Boom To Early 2000s Dot-Com Era
summary: Jeff Bezos says space-based data centers could be reality within decades, while comparing the AI boom to the early internet surge.
